[textmode.synth.js](../../../index.md) / [SynthSource](../../SynthSource.md) / hue

# Method: hue()

```ts
hue(hue?): this;
```

Shift hue.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `hue?` | [`SynthParameterValue`](../../../type-aliases/SynthParameterValue.md) | Hue shift amount (default: 0.4) |

## Returns

`this`
